MetricRatioDefinition.description: Explicit ratio derived from variants or other metrics.

numerator.description: Variant key or metric id used as numerator
numerator.title: Numerator

denominator.description: Variant key or metric id used as denominator
denominator.title: Denominator

description.description: Optional notes clarifying the ratio logic
description.title: Description

MetricRatioDefinition.title: MetricRatioDefinition

auto_percent_of_base.description: Automatically publish percent-of-base values for each variant
auto_percent_of_base.title: Auto Percent Of Base

format.description: Formatting token applied to automatically generated percent ratios
format.title: Format

definitions.description: Explicitly defined ratio entries keyed by identifier
definitions.title: Definitions

MetricVariant.description: Variant of a base metric (e.g. automated, manual).

calculate.description: Additional DAX-style predicates applied on top of the base metric
calculate.title: Calculate

notes.description: Optional implementation or sourcing notes for the variant
notes.title: Notes

variants.description: Optional nested variants that inherit this variant's filters
variants.title: Variants

value_type.description: Override the display value type for this variant (number, percent, currency).
value_type.title: Value Type

MetricVariant.title: MetricVariant

description: Business-centric definition of an MSA metric.

schema.description: Optional schema version identifier for the metric document
schema.title: Schema

extends.description: Optional parent metric key to inherit base definitions from
extends.title: Extends

key.description: Stable identifier for referencing the metric
key.title: Key

section.description: Grouping or dashboard section the metric belongs to
section.title: Section

define.description: Optional base expression (e.g., DAX) describing how the metric is calculated
define.title: Define

tags.description: Optional free-form taxonomy tags (e.g. timeliness, automation)
tags.title: Tags

calculate.description: Base DAX-style predicates describing the metric scope
calculate.title: Calculate

variants.description: Named variants that apply additional predicates or business logic
variants.title: Variants

ratios.description: Automatic or explicit ratios derived from this metric

value_type.description: Display value type for the metric (number, percent, currency).
value_type.title: Value Type

title: MetricDefinition
